summary.label: Design expertise
summary.detail: Architect and interior designer review translated into repeatable spatial standards.
summary.detailZh: 把建筑师与室内设计师经验转成可复用的空间标准。

summary.label: Space uplift model
summary.detail: Use, flow, visual focus, brand fit and biophilic atmosphere.
summary.detailZh: 从使用、动线、视觉焦点、品牌适配和亲生物氛围评估空间。

summary.label: Client value
summary.detail: Spatial improvement evidence supports renewal, upsell and FM account expansion.
summary.detailZh: 空间改善证据服务续约、加购和 FM 客户扩展。

summary.label: Human authority
summary.detail: AI can assist with diagnosis, but senior designers approve client-facing recommendations.
summary.detailZh: AI 辅助诊断，正式建议由资深设计团队把关。

diagnostics.label: Use pattern
diagnostics.body: Checks whether the green asset improves how people enter, wait, meet or circulate in the space.

diagnostics.label: Sightline focus
diagnostics.body: Maps what clients and visitors see first, then aligns the wall, pods and photo proof to those viewpoints.

diagnostics.label: Material and light fit
diagnostics.body: Reviews lighting, wall material, brand signage and surrounding finishes before recommending plant density.

diagnostics.label: Biophilic atmosphere
diagnostics.body: Looks at texture, calmness, vertical rhythm and perceived comfort rather than only counting green area.

diagnostics.label: Maintainability
diagnostics.body: Ensures the design can be maintained by FM teams without blocking access, signage, fire routes or cleaning.

interventions.intent: Create a premium biophilic arrival moment.
interventions.recommendation: Increase edge planting density and align after-photo angle with the lift arrival sightline.
interventions.designerNote: Keep the green wall calm and vertical; avoid visual clutter near brand signage.

interventions.intent: Make the planted wall read as a sales asset, not a decorative backdrop.
interventions.recommendation: Use same-angle before/after proof from the main buyer walk-in route and track visitor touchpoints.
interventions.designerNote: The composition should frame the premium view and soften the hard material palette.
opsHandoff: Keep feature edge below signage line

interventions.intent: Reduce perceived waiting stress while keeping the clinic clean, calm and trustworthy.
interventions.recommendation: Rebalance plant texture near the waiting zone and keep the lower modules tidy for seated sightlines.
interventions.designerNote: Avoid an overly wild look; the clinic needs calm greenery, controlled density and visible order.

designPrinciples.label: Function first
designPrinciples.rule: Green assets must improve how the space is used, not only decorate it.

designPrinciples.label: Viewpoint control
designPrinciples.rule: The system records the most important visitor, staff and camera viewpoints for proof photos.

designPrinciples.label: Brand and material fit
designPrinciples.rule: Plant density, texture and rhythm should match the client's brand tone and interior palette.

designPrinciples.label: Maintainability
designPrinciples.rule: A beautiful installation is not accepted unless the FM team can maintain it repeatedly.

workflow.body: Capture site photos, floor-plan notes, user flow, key view lines and pain points.
Define the role of the green asset: arrival, privacy, premium branding, wellness or sales support.
Translate the design intent into visit checks, photo angles, lighting notes and maintenance constraints.
Use before/after views, designer notes and health records in the renewal or upsell pack.

proofPack.label: Before / after view
proofPack.body: Same-angle photos show visible spatial uplift rather than generic plant maintenance.

proofPack.label: Design intent
proofPack.body: Each installation states what spatial job it performs for the client.

proofPack.label: Designer note
proofPack.body: Senior architectural or interior design comments explain why a recommendation is credible.

proofPack.label: Ops handoff
proofPack.body: FM teams receive the exact checks needed to keep the design value alive after installation.

proofPack.label: Renewal narrative
proofPack.body: The monthly report can show space improvement, health score, service proof and ESG evidence together.
